violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils can opener were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
The outside of the hood system was observed with an excess of debris. Hood systems must be maintained New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Food items in the walk in observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2024

Food Items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler and in the back area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets on the prep unit were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
The hood system was observed with an excess of debris hood systems must be maintained to prevent drippage. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
